common.soonBody: This page is under construction. Soon you'll find details about the Solvefy/CPaaS {{channel}} channel.

sms.metaDescription: Solvefy/CPaaS SMS API: transactional and mass messaging with direct carrier routes.

whatsapp.metaDescription: Solvefy/CPaaS WhatsApp API: mass messaging, approved templates and interactive buttons on the #1 channel.

email.metaDescription: Solvefy/CPaaS Email API: transactional and marketing journeys with high deliverability.

rcs.metaDescription: Solvefy/CPaaS RCS API: SMS 2.0 with rich media, verified profiles and interactive buttons.
